name: Buffalo Lodge Bicycle Resort
description: The base camp for adventure. Directly on the Midland Trail with group rides and bike storage.

name: The Broadmoor
description: Historic Five-Star resort at the foot of Cheyenne Cañon.

name: Garden of the Gods Resort
description: Panoramic views of the park and Pikes Peak. Exclusive wellness services.

name: Manitou Brewing Co.
description: Post-ride fuel in the heart of Manitou Springs. High-quality craft beers.

name: Cerberus Brewing
description: Gourmet food and award-winning beers with a massive dog-friendly patio.

name: Trails End Taproom
description: Pay by the ounce and enjoy the local trail community vibe.

name: Garden of the Gods Park
description: Iconic red sandstone formations and miles of paved and unpaved trails.

name: Pikes Peak Cog Railway
description: The highest cog railway in the world, taking you to the 14,115ft summit.

name: Red Rock Canyon Open Space
description: A playground of sandstone canyons and ridge trails with city views.
